home.badge: All your schedules. One smart platform.
home.subtitle: SuperPlanify helps people and organizations manage schedules, changes and notifications in one place.

members.orgs_intro: This is where you will create, manage and organize your SuperPlanify organizations.
members.settings_intro: This is where you change your application settings and preferences.
members.billing_intro: This is where you choose your plan.
members.scheds_intro: This is where you see and manage your schedules.

allSchedules.title: All schedules
allSchedules.description: Bring school, work, training and personal schedules together in one place.

realTimeUpdates.title: Real-time updates
realTimeUpdates.description: Stay aligned when classes, sessions or events move.

workflows.title: Frictionless workflows
workflows.description: Replace scattered emails, WhatsApp groups and hallway decisions with structured requests.

peopleTeams.title: Built for people & teams
peopleTeams.description: Join existing schedules as an individual, or create and manage an organization.

pricing.title: Simple plans for every stage.
pricing.subtitle: Start small, grow when you need more capacity, and contact us when your organization needs a tailored plan.

free.name: Free
free.description: For individuals and very small teams getting started.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For growing organizations that need more room.
features: Invite up to 100 members per organization

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For larger organizations with specific needs.
features: Receive a quote tailored to your needs

contact.title: Let’s talk about your scheduling needs.
contact.subtitle: Send us a message for suggestions, quotes or anything else related to SuperPlanify.

form.success_message: Thank you for your message. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
